diagrams.title: Truth Table Layout for Two Variables
diagrams.description: Shows the standard format for truth tables with 2 variables (P, Q) - 4 rows with alternating patterns
diagrams.purpose: Learn correct truth table construction pattern

diagrams.title: Venn Diagram for AND and OR
diagrams.description: Visual representation of conjunction and disjunction using overlapping circles
elements: AND: Intersection (shaded area where both circles overlap)
OR: Union (total shaded area of both circles)
diagrams.purpose: Intuitive understanding of connectives as set operations

diagrams.title: Implication as Subset Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows implication P → Q as set P being subset of set Q
elements: Circle P completely inside Circle Q
When P is true (inside), Q must also be true (inside)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why P→Q is false only when P is true but Q is false

diagrams.title: Inference Rules Summary
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing Modus Ponens and Modus Tollens reasoning patterns
elements: Modus Ponens: Premise P→Q, Premise P, Conclusion Q
Modus Tollens: Premise P→Q, Premise ¬Q, Conclusion ¬P
